findings.finding: Lever-based deformation is the confirmed working rendering formula. Ghost sphere formulation confirmed equivalent — same surface, different mathematical expression.

formula.f: von_mises(dir, bump_dir, c) = exp(c * dot(dir, bump_dir)) / exp(c)
formula.angle: lean_amount + bend_amount * f — lean: constant; bend: von-Mises weighted
formula.pos: dir * rmin + sum of contributions over all bumps

ghost_sphere_equivalent.full_vec: dir * rmin + sum(rotate_axis_angle(dir * amplitude * f, lean_axis, angle))
ghost_sphere_equivalent.note: Identical to lever formula. Useful for collision radius field.

findings.normals: finite difference on eval_pos. Pole guard: if length(dphi) < 0.01 return dir (not dp_dtheta — degenerate at poles).
findings.billboards: normal-facing for stable orientation. world_pos = particle.position.xyz not billboard offset.
findings.note: Camera-facing billboards caused pole artifacts due to ref_up flip. Normal-facing is stable.

findings.finding: Working shader is lever-based (shadersRotateJoint.rs). Ghost sphere shader had broken lean/bend — lean_amount used as linear distance not angle.
findings.working_shader: lever approach — bump_contribution with rotate_axis_angle(dir*amplitude*f, lean_axis, angle)
findings.broken_shader: ghost sphere eval_r approach — lean_amount * rmin as linear ghost shift
findings.restoration: Reverted to lever shader mid-session. Ghost sphere kept as COMPUTE_SHADER_GHOST for collision comparison only.
findings.note: bend_mode toggle removed — single working mode only.

findings.finding: CPU-side ground plane collision ring implemented and rendering correctly. Red particles mark intersection of blob surface with ground_y plane.
findings.implementation: eval_pos_cpu mirrors compute shader lever formula exactly. 128x128 sphere samples, flags where world_y within epsilon of ground_y.
findings.note: eval_pos_cpu must match shader formula exactly or ring diverges from surface.

findings.finding: Separate limits for lean and bend. Max bend uses 2D tangent condition. Max lean fixed at 60 degrees.
findings.status: confirmed working — may need recalibration for lever shader
findings.max_bend: Bisection on tangent condition in 2D lean plane. 128 samples inner, 24 bisection steps.
findings.warning: Constraints were designed during ghost sphere era. Feathering at extreme lean+bend acceptable for now.

findings.finding: Ghost point behind bump tip. Formula confirmed from lever surface.
findings.status: formula confirmed, collision not yet implemented

findings.finding: Ground ring implemented. Blob-blob not yet.
findings.ground_collision: CPU eval_pos_cpu samples sphere, flags y <= ground_y. Renders as red ring.

findings.finding: Von-Mises minus Gaussian composition produces smooth flat-topped lobe.
findings.practical_values: cv=5.1 cg=7.3 A~11.5 gives ~10-11 degree flat zone

findings.finding: Deformation field and volume rescale solved jointly.
Deformation field doubles as sensory surface.
findings.sensory_blobs: each basis term is a detectable feature — coefficients are the sensory signal

findings.finding: Motor layer is prescribed oscillation with hierarchical control.

structure.movement_set: Bumps with fixed relative phases, frequencies, amplitude ratios. Additive.
structure.parameter_modulation: Individual bump parameters nudgeable for steering.

evolution.first_experiments: Pure oscillation evolution, no nervous system.

findings.finding: Sensory-to-motor via function composition graph in basis language.
findings.status: design — approach selected, not yet formalized
findings.rationale: Linear map rejected. Neural networks deferred. Function graph evolvable and interpretable.
